stemHtml: During a flight using PBN, the navigation system provides a pilot with an RNP of 1.0 NM and an EPE of 1.3 NM. What does this tell the pilot?

options.a: Flight Technical Error (FTE) is within tolerance but the pilot should use the autopilot to improve accuracy.
options.b: Navigation System Error (NSE) is within tolerance but the pilot should use the autopilot to improve accuracy.
options.c: Navigation System Error (NSE) is outside of tolerance due to the inaccuracy of the aircraft position.
options.d: Flight Technical Error (FTE) is outside of tolerance due to inaccurate track-keeping.
